description: Continuous tracking of thermal conditions inside refrigerators and storage zones.
benefits: Ensures product quality, prevents spoilage, and safeguards vaccines/food items

description: Real-time SMS and email alerts triggered immediately when sensor readings cross predefined safe thresholds.
parameters_tracked: Temperature excursion, Sensor failure, Power loss
benefits: Enables quick corrective actions to protect sensitive cold chain cargo

description: Generates audit-ready digital reports to simplify compliance with regulatory bodies.
benefits: Ensures compliance with FDA Title 21 CFR Part 11, HACCP, WHO, and GAMP guidelines

description: Tracks main utility power availability and backup battery health to prevent hardware downtime.
parameters_tracked: Main power status, Backup battery voltage
benefits: Prevents data gaps and system downtime during power grid failures

description: GPS tracking for refrigerated vehicles and mobile containers moving goods through the cold chain.
benefits: Enables real-time location monitoring and transit ETA estimation

description: Detects and logs refrigerator door openings to avoid thermal leaking and unauthorized access.
benefits: Minimizes thermal loss, saves energy, and improves security
